transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Bright Path Health Line. This is Ava, your care navigator. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need a refill on my blood pressure medicine. I think I'm almost out.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can help with that. Can I get your full name and date of birth to pull up your file?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sure, it's Marcus Feldt, born June 3rd, 1968.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Marcus. I see a prescription for Lisinopril 10 milligrams, one tablet daily, last filled about a month ago at Cedar Grove Pharmacy. Is that the one?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Yes, that's it. I have maybe two days left.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it. I'll send a refill request to Cedar Grove Pharmacy on Fifth Street right now for the same dosage.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Great, thank you. How long before it's ready?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: They usually process refills within a couple hours. I'd say it should be ready for pickup by this afternoon.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're all set, Marcus. Is there anything else I can help you with today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No, that's everything. Thanks so much.
